name: Pistachio & White Chocolate Cookies^
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 cups Firmly packed light brown sugar
1 cup Toasted and skinned Pistachios, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Place sheets of foil on the cooling rack.
3. In a large bowl, beat together brown sugar, Crisco, milk, and vanilla until well blended.
4. Beat in egg.
5. Gradually add flour, baking soda, and salt to the creamed mixture, stirring just until combined.
6. Stir in white chocolate chunks and chopped pistachios.
7. Drop by teaspoonfuls about 3 inches apart onto ungreased cookie sheets.
8. Bake, one sheet at a time, for 8-10 minutes for chewy cookies or 11-13 minutes for crisp cookies.
9. Cool on the baking sheet for 2 minutes before transferring to the foil cooling rack.
